name: Task Breakdown
description: Break down goals into sequenced worker tasks with explicit dependencies and acceptance checks.

instructions: Break the goal into incremental deliverables with explicit dependency order.
Keep each delegated task independently verifiable by acceptance criteria.
expectedArtifacts: Task decomposition and executable implementation output.
acceptanceCriteria: Subtasks are ordered by dependency and can be executed by workers.
Each subtask has concrete acceptance criteria.
